ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- Denied - triable issue of fact regarding negligence of store owner where cart left in aisle. Appearance of cart and low height create triable issue regarding open and obvious condition. (AJR/md) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
